name: HomeGrown Makeover with Frederique and Carter
original_name: HomeGrown Makeover with Frederique and Carter
overview: Frederique and Carter take people in greenery-deprived living spaces and provides flower and plant solutions to remedy various home issues by crafting creative, custom flower and plant designs and builds.
